query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN operationalConsent = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as operational_consent_true,
  SUM(CASE WHEN marketingConsent = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as marketing_consent_true,
  SUM(CASE WHEN marketingConsent = false THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as marketing_consent_false
FROM sports_day_registrations;
